reviews.review_description: New version works great! Love the High score feature! It is very competitive now and lots of fun!
Would be a good idea, doesn’t work.

developer_response.body:
This should be fixed in our latest major update!

We apologize for the previous state of the game and hope you’ll give it another shot 🏀

Hey chomp! I'm sorry the app didn't work for you. I am planning to make some fixes to improve the in-game experience. If you have any specific feedback about what wasn't working or feature requests, please send it to scrubgamingstudios@gmail.com.

Also, if you are interested in other free mixed reality games check out our studios two newest releases: Hallway Heist (https://www.meta.com/en-gb/experiences/hallway-heist/7821177537948460/) and Fruit Fall (https://www.meta.com/en-gb/experiences/fruit-fall/7197249670387687/).
